headline: Is T-Mobile US (TMUS) Now At An Attractive Price After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether T-Mobile US is attractively priced right now, the key question is whether the current share price reflects what the business may be worth over the long term. The stock closed at US$192.43, with returns of a 3.1% decline over 7 days, an 11.5% decline over 30 days, a 3.6% decline year to date, and a 25.5% decline over 1 year, compared with gains of 33.0% over 3 years and 51.6% over 5 years. These mixed returns have kept valuation front of mind for many investors,...
